name: libperl4-corelibs-perl
title: libperl4-corelibs-perl
description:
libraries historically supplied with Perl 4
Perl4::CoreLibs is a collection of .pl files that have historically been
bundled with the Perl core but are not distributed with core version 5.15 or
later. Following their removal, they should be acquired from this package
instead.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libperl4-corelibs-perl because libraries historically supplied with Perl 4.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libperl4-corelibs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libperl4-corelibs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libperl4-corelibs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
